Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR is a visual resource cleanup rather than a reported bug with reproduction steps. Source inspection identifies the affected SVG load path, but runtime rendering still needs visual proof.

target.title: chore: update Ollama provider icon
target.body:
The bundled Ollama provider icon was a low-fidelity single-path silhouette that looked rough in the menu bar. This swaps it for the cleaner official Ollama mark.

- White fill, transparent background, square viewBox — same conventions as before, so it still renders as a template image and tints correctly in light/dark menu bars.
- Only touches `Sources/CodexBar/Resources/ProviderIcon-ollama.svg`; the separate `docs/logos/ollama.svg` is left untouched.

Tested locally on 0.34.0 — renders crisp at menu-bar size.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
target.author: mattab178
